case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MELENDEZ, MIGUEL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, MIGUEL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $969.76 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, MIGUEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, MIGUEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, MIGUEL $969.76 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $995.76 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
